name: BEN_DOCS_PRVDD_DTLS
description: BEN_DOCS_PRVDD_DTLS stores the details of the Document uploaded against certification requirements along with the validity details

columns.Name: DOCS_PRVDD_DTLS_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id(Foreign Key to per_all_people_f)

columns.Name: CONTACT_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Contact Person Id

columns.Name: CTFN_TYPE_CD
columns.Comments: Certification Type

columns.Name: DOCUMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to hr_document_types_b

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Approval Status

columns.Name: DOR_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to hr_documents_of_record

columns.Name: UPLOADED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who uploaded the document.

columns.Name: UPLOADED_DT
columns.Comments: Date on which the Document was uploaded

columns.Name: VALIDITY_STRT_DT
columns.Comments: Start of the Documents Validity

columns.Name: VALIDITY_END_DT
columns.Comments: End of the Documents Validity

columns.Name: APPROVAL_STRT_DT
columns.Comments: Start of Approval Validity

columns.Name: APPROVAL_END_DT
columns.Comments: End of Approval Validity

columns.Name: APPROVED_BY
columns.Comments: Document Approved By

columns.Name: VERIFICATION_MODE
columns.Comments: This specifies whether a manual approval from admin is needed or not(auto)

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Approval Comments

columns.Name: APPROVED_DT
columns.Comments: Date on which the Document was approved

columns.Name: REJECTED_DT
columns.Comments: Date on which the Document was denied

columns.Name: REJECTION_REASON
columns.Comments: Reason why the Document has been rejected

columns.Name: MAPPING_TABLE_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the table for which the document setup has been done

columns.Name: MAPPING_COLUMN_NAME
columns.Comments: Mapping Table Column Name

columns.Name: MAPPING_TABLE_PK_ID
columns.Comments: Mapping Table Primary Key Id

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS

columns.Name: VALIDITY_CD
columns.Comments: Code which determines the validity time of the document

columns.Name: VALIDITY_TM_NUM
columns.Comments: This determines the time period for which the document will be valid. This will be blank when the Validity_cd is 'Lifetime'

columns.Name: APPROVAL_PERD_CD
columns.Comments: Code which determines the time for which the approval is valid

columns.Name: APPROVAL_PERD_TM_NUM
columns.Comments: This determines the time period for which the approval will be valid.

columns.Name: DOC_USG_CD
columns.Comments: This value differentiates whether the row was created as part of Certification Process or as part of Record Life Event

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: PROGRAM_APP_NAME
columns.Comments: Program Application

columns.Name: PROGRAM_NAME
columns.Comments: Program

columns.Name: PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Concurrent Program who column - date when a program last updated this row

columns.Name: CONFIG_ID_1
columns.Comments: Template ID field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_ID_2
columns.Comments: Template ID field for future use.

columns.Comments: Template ID field for future use.

columns.Comments: Template ID field for future use.

columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_4
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_CHAR_5
columns.Comments: Template character field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_1
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_2
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_3
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_4
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_DATE_5
columns.Comments: Template date field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_1
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_2
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.

columns.Name: CONFIG_NUM_3
columns.Comments: Template number field for future use.
